extortion.description: LAMPIRE Biological Laboratories, a pioneering biotech life science firm specializing in the creation and supply of vital biological reagents for the diagnostic and pharmaceutical industries. Our extensive offerings encompass tailor-made polyclonal and monoclonal antibody development, secondary antibodies, IgGs, BSA, animal blood, tissues, and organs. We also provide both normal and disease-state human serums and plasmas, along with cutting-edge cell media, OMNI C3 cell culture bags, contract manufacturing solutions, and an array of technical support services.
